title: clematis aristata var. coriacea
intro: Clematis aristata var. coriacea, also known as the Mountain Clematis, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Clematis aristata var. coriacea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
